description_long: This is a standard traffic cone with a conical shape and a square base, commonly used for road safety and traffic control in urban environments. The cone is predominantly orange with two wide, horizontal reflective silver-gray stripes encircling its upper and middle sections. The surface of the cone shows visible signs of wear, including dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, suggesting it has been used outdoors. The base is broad and flat, providing stability, and appears to be made of a heavier material to prevent tipping. The tip of the cone is pointed and solid, matching the orange color of the rest of the cone. No logos, text, or additional markings are visible on any side of the object.
description: A worn orange traffic cone with two wide reflective silver-gray stripes and a sturdy square base, showing signs of outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the cone, both reflective stripes, and the square base with visible dirt and wear.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with similar features, but the reflective stripes and base appear slightly more scuffed.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, with the reflective stripes and orange surface showing more pronounced wear and fading.
description_view_3: Final view highlighting the cone's pointed tip and the square base, with visible dirt and surface abrasions.
attribute_reflective_stripes: Two wide, horizontal reflective stripes encircle the cone, one near the top and one at mid-height, both silver-gray in color.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is pointed, solid, and orange, with no attachments or distinctive features.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and relatively thick, likely weighted for stability, with a slightly rough texture and visible wear.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible.
attribute_condition: Worn, with visible dirt, scuff marks, and some fading, indicating outdoor use.
